text.title: generator-critic-bounded-loop Decision Tree
text.summary: Choose loop type and critic model.

decision-tree.root-question: On the eval set, does iteration 2 change quality by more than 2% (in either direction)?

branch.conclusion: Kill the loop entirely; single-shot generation is sufficient.
Use cheap critic (Haiku tier). Cap = 3. Plateau exit on score delta < 0.02.
Use same-tier critic as the generator; cap = 3; plateau exit on score delta < 0.02.
Split: cheap rubric critic runs first; if rubric passes, strong correctness critic runs second. Cuts critic cost ~60%.
